nasb.text: They answered a second time and said, “Let the king tell the dream to his servants, and we will declare the interpretation.”

esv.text: They answered a second time and said, “Let the king tell his servants the dream, and we will show its interpretation.”

cnv.text: 他們第二次回答王說：“請王把夢告訴僕人，我們好解釋夢的意思。”

ccb.text: 他们再次对王说：“请王将梦告诉仆人，仆人好解释梦的意思。”
